parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human actor in a physical kitchen environment. The camera movements, natural lighting, and physical interactions with objects confirm it is human-recorded.

characters.appearance: Young adult, slim build, fair complexion, long straight blonde hair.
characters.wardrobe: Fitted long-sleeved blue top and a black skirt.
characters.demeanor: Initially confused, then surprised and interested.

characters.appearance: 3D cartoon style, young female, fair skin, big eyes, wavy red hair.
characters.wardrobe: Not clearly visible, appears as a floating head/shoulders on screen.

scenes.setting: Modern kitchen, daytime, white cabinets, black sink.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands in a modern kitchen. She is holding a stainless steel kettle over a black sink. She wears a fitted blue long-sleeved shirt and a black skirt. On the light wood counter next to the sink lies a tablet displaying Character B. The kitchen features white cabinets and bright, natural-looking lighting. Character A looks down at the tablet with a confused and slightly frustrated expression as she handles the kettle.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows the woman in the kitchen interacting with the tablet on the counter. Large text overlays appear on screen, showing the words being spoken in various languages. Strings of national flags, corresponding to the spoken languages, are displayed at the top of the screen. The tablet screen clearly shows the app interface with the 3D avatar. The overall composition centers on the woman's reaction to the app's voice prompts.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Buongiorno. [Good morning.]
Character A says: No hablo italiano. [I don't speak Italian.]
Character A says: Non parlo italiano! [I don't speak Italian!]
Character A says: Non parlo italiano. [I don't speak Italian.]
Character B says: Bonjour? [Hello?]
Character A says: No france?
Character A says: Je parle pas francais. [I don't speak French.]
Character A says: Je parle pas francais. [I don't speak French.]
Character B says: こんにちは? [Hello?]
Character A says: Hallo? [Hello?]
Character A says: Uuuh...
Character B says: 안녕하세요. [Hello.]

scenes.setting: Modern kitchen, daytime, white cabinets, black sink.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is now holding a white bowl in the kitchen. She reaches up to place the bowl inside an open upper white cabinet. She turns her head to look down towards the tablet resting on the counter. She then holds a clear plastic cup, looking at the tablet with a skeptical expression. The tablet remains in its position on the counter, showing Character B. The kitchen setting remains consistent with white cabinets and a black sink.

scenes.visual_description: The woman continues her kitchen tasks while conversing with the tablet. Large, colorful text overlays dynamically display the English dialogue in the center of the screen. The text changes rapidly to match the spoken words. The tablet screen remains visible on the counter, showing the avatar. The framing keeps the woman and the tablet in view as she moves slightly.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: How many languages can you speak!
Character B says: Many! I'm an AI tutor on Praktika, and the best part is that I can teach you any language you want!
Character A says: Oh but I'm really bad with languages.

scenes.setting: Modern kitchen, daytime, white cabinets, black sink.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A closes the upper white cabinet door in the kitchen. She picks up a white mug and a small white device from the counter. She looks surprised and engaged, smiling and nodding while looking down at the tablet. She holds the mug in one hand and the small device in the other. The tablet remains on the counter, displaying Character B. The lighting and kitchen background remain unchanged.

scenes.visual_description: The woman finishes her conversation with the AI tutor, looking pleased with the interaction. Text overlays continue to show the English dialogue prominently on the screen. The text styling remains consistent with the previous scene. The tablet is still visible on the counter, anchoring the source of the AI voice. The scene captures her positive reaction before transitioning to the end card.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Don't worry, I can teach you in your native language too!
Character A says: You know my language?
Character B says: Of course, I'm an AI! Download Praktika and you will become a language pro!
Character A says: Okay, I will download this app!

panels.panel_visual_description: The scene transitions to a completely blank screen. The background is a solid, uniform white color. There are no characters, props, or settings visible in this frame. The lighting appears flat and even across the entire surface. No other visual elements are present.

scenes.visual_description: The video concludes with a standard promotional end-card. A white background displays the purple Praktika app logo prominently in the center. The website URL 'praktika.ai' is written below the logo. At the bottom, standard download badges for the Google Play Store and Apple App Store are visible. The layout is clean and focused entirely on driving app downloads.
